steps.title: Focus on crater size
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize the size of Bilyi Yar. The useful notes are that it is an impact crater in Ukraine, was formed around 80 million years ago, and has a diameter of approximately 3.5 km. The best sentence should make that size prominent.

steps.title: Compare the choices
steps.content: B omits the 3.5 km measurement. C includes the measurement but focuses on researchers investigating the formation. D discusses impact craters generally and omits Bilyi Yar's diameter. The remaining sentence directly calls Bilyi Yar massive and gives its diameter. The answer is A.
